/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wno-comment -Wno-reorder -Wno-unused-variable -Wtype-limits -std=c++14 -fno-strict-aliasing -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -march=native -mfpmath=sse -mavx2 -DLV_HAVE_AVX2 -DLV_HAVE_AVX -DLV_HAVE_SSE -fvisibility=hidden -O3 -fno-trapping-math -fno-math-errno -DBUILD_TYPE_RELEASE -Werror -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-result -Wno-maybe-uninitialized -Wno-error=format-truncation -Wno-error=deprecated-declarations -Wno-array-bounds -Wno-stringop-overread -Wno-stringop-overflow -Wno-maybe-uninitialized -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/zmq_remote_rx.dir/zmq_remote_rx.c.o -o zmq_remote_rx  -Wl,-rpath,/home/masfiqur/mayo/mayo-Scheme/OTA/srsRAN_4G/build/lib/src/phy/rf:/usr/local/lib ../src/phy/libsrsran_phy.a ../src/phy/rf/libsrsran_rf.so.23.04.0 /usr/local/lib/libzmq.so -ldl ../src/phy/rf/libsrsran_rf_utils.a ../src/phy/libsrsran_phy.a -lpthread -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfftw3f.so
